hackathon.name: Pharos Skill-to-Agent Dual Cascade Hackathon - Phase 1

delivery_mode_reason: DoraHacks online submissions are judged from project page fields and video/live links; a combined pitch+demo video is the safest primary artifact, with deck/README as supporting evidence.

openclaw.reviewer_visible_use: OpenClaw reports replayfence ready, visible to model, and available as command before the capsule demo runs.

frontend.dependency_policy: frontend deps install with @latest or unversioned targets unless a verified compatibility override is recorded
frontend.non_tailwind_visual_signature: latch-state cockpit with proof rail, terminal hash panels, data-visual-lane markers, and replay rejection shock band
frontend.hero_composition: control room triptych: action card, latch timeline, proof capsule preview
frontend.visual_differentiation_note: No purple crypto gradient or generic admin cards; proof-dense charcoal/acid control panel with explicit state machine.

qr_mobile_access.entry: QR code opens the live /try URL directly on mobile
qr_mobile_access.mobile_primary_flow: Try as Guest then Fence + Execute Once in two taps; sticky CTA changes to Replay and Inspect Capsule
qr_mobile_access.desktop_parity_plan: Desktop keeps a 16:10 three-column workbench with keyboard copy affordances and visible proof rail

asset_sources.logo: logo-generator skill output planned before final brand pack; minimum wordmark/logomark/mono/favicon/og
asset_sources.avatars: none; generated guest session chip only

motion: Framer Motion only if needed after P0

winnerThesis.trackProblem: agent tool retries can duplicate side effects, and private idempotency logs are hard for judges or downstream agents to verify
winnerThesis.chainPrimitive: Pharos on-chain once-latch state plus explorer/proof evidence
winnerThesis.userAction: run a safe agent action once, replay it, and see the duplicate rejected by the same latch key
winnerThesis.proofSurface: Pharos tx hash, LatchConsumed event, capsule JSON, and verifier report
winnerThesis.genericCloneToAvoid: wallet dashboard, token list, NFT mint, fake receipt, or crypto chatbot

web3.demoWalletPlacement: server-side restricted relayer with visible address/chain/balance health in app chrome

deploy.contracts: Hardhat deploy to Pharos Atlantic Testnet

required_env.name: PHAROS_RPC_URL
required_env.required_for: Pharos Atlantic contract reads/writes and proof fetches

required_env.name: PRIVATE_KEY
required_env.required_for: low-value testnet relayer and contract deployment
required_env.storage: $HOME/use_key.txt -> .env.local/.dev.vars locally; Wrangler secret for deployed runtime if needed

required_env.name: DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY
required_env.storage: same value as PRIVATE_KEY; do not ask for a second key

real_data_sources.source: B6 browser guest history mirror over seeded JSON evidence; D1/SQLite remains the deployment storage target
real_data_sources.evidence: tests/onboard.spec.ts reopens /capsules after /try saves a guest-owned capsule record

real_data_sources.source: Pharos RPC eth_getProof for registry storage target
real_data_sources.evidence: proof panel reports FETCHED, VERIFIED, FAILED, or UNAVAILABLE honestly

sponsor_technology.name: Pharos Atlantic Testnet
sponsor_technology.primitive: EVM-compatible chain state and transaction receipt
sponsor_technology.reviewer_visible_use: first action consumes a latch on Pharos and the replay is rejected against that public latch state
sponsor_technology.proof: Pharos tx hash and explorer link stored in ReplayFence Capsule

sponsor_technology.name: Pharos eth_getProof
sponsor_technology.reviewer_visible_use: capsule verifier derives the storage target and reports proof status for the latch record

product_backbone.identity: guestSessionId in localStorage during B6; deployment target is guest cookie plus restricted server session
product_backbone.storage: B6 localStorage history mirror over public/evidence seeded JSON; D1/SQLite is reserved for B8/G5 deployment storage
product_backbone.multi_user_proof: second browser/incognito context pastes exported capsule into /verify and confirms derived latch result without private session state

user_case_beats.state_change: guestSessionId is created in localStorage and visible in the Try workbench
status CONSUMED and tx hash visible
user_case_beats.backend_evidence: demo/pharos-consume-report.json firstConsume receipt and PharosScan link

user_case_beats.state_change: status REPLAY_REJECTED and original tx shown
capsule detail and proof panel visible
user_case_beats.backend_evidence: src/app/capsules/[capsuleId]/page.tsx reads seeded proof bundle; /try mirrors guest records into localStorage history
src/app/verify/verify-client.jsx recomputes hashes; Playwright route/click smoke and tests/onboard.spec.ts pass

user_case_beats.state_change: copy success toast and reusable wrapper visible
user_case_beats.backend_evidence: packages/replayfence-skill source, src/app/docs/skill/page.tsx, and OpenClaw install evidence

operability.fresh_user_hero_path: Fresh Playwright context starts at /, clicks Try as Guest, reveals consume/replay evidence, and opens /capsules. See tests/onboard.spec.ts.
operability.public_access: Guest evidence workbench with no wallet or login on the hero flow; fresh Pharos writes remain CLI/local until the restricted relayer ships.
operability.reset_or_seed_strategy: Seeded OpenClaw and Pharos reports are safe public examples; guest localStorage history can be cleared from /capsules without deleting seeds.
operability.abuse_limits: No private relayer key is exposed in the browser; local guest history is capped at 12 records; CLI fresh writes require local env secrets.

prd_coverage.minimum: every P0/P1 REQ-### row has route/API/real-data/test/deploy evidence before recording

open_questions: Need D1/SQLite deployment storage and restricted public relayer before claiming public fresh-chain writes.
Need exact DoraHacks form fields rechecked during G7 before final submission copy.
